name: Peanut Butter & Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the white bread setting.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients in the order listed.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased baking pan.
4. Press "Start" on your oven and bake according to the yeast package instructions.
5. Turn off the heat once the bread is cooked through.
